
Propositional knowing is a kind of knowing where one holds [[Propositions]] 

== Traits ==
Traits<ref>https://www.meaningcrisis.co/ep-45-awakening-from-the-meaning-crisis-the-nature-of-wisdom/</ref>

* Active open mindedness
* Inferential
* Fact/Principle
* Failure: Fallacious reasoning
* S2 processing

==Quote==

{{Quote|

* Propositional knowledge (episteme): For example, knowing that energy and mass are equivalent or that Paris is the capital of France.

 
|[[awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com]]<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20210307142111/https://awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com/knowledge</ref>}}[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Propositional knowing]]==References==
[[Category:Knowledge]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Propositional knowing]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Propositional knowing]][[sn:Propositional knowing]]
[[Category:Pages]]
